name: Orbit CLI
description: Pure-plumbing wrapper around Orbit's HTTP API + claw-side fetchers. 15 tools: orbit_observation_emit, orbit_observation_bulk, orbit_person_get, orbit_persons_list_enriched, orbit_self_init, orbit_persons_going_cold, orbit_person_get_by_email, orbit_meeting_upsert, orbit_meeting_list, orbit_topics_upsert, orbit_topics_get, orbit_calendar_fetch, orbit_messages_fetch, orbit_jobs_claim, orbit_jobs_report. Reads ORBIT_API_URL + ORBIT_API_KEY from env. No LLM calls — observer/resolver/brief/topic SKILLs own all interpretation.

description.description: Plugin reads two required env vars. ORBIT_API_URL is the fully-qualified base including /api/v1 (e.g. http://100.97.152.84:3047/api/v1). ORBIT_API_KEY is the Bearer token (orb_live_*). Do NOT prepend /api/v1 when invoking tools — it's already in the URL.
